description: This file defines a TemplateFactory class used for creating and manipulating HTML templates with configurable content, sanitization, and styling. It is part of the Bootstrap utility library.

classes.name: TemplateFactory
classes.description: A class for creating HTML templates with configurable content, sanitization, and styling options, extending the Config class.

methods.name: getContent
methods.description: Returns the current content entries, resolving any functions.

methods.name: hasContent
methods.description: Checks if the template has any content.

methods.name: changeContent
methods.description: Updates the content of the template with new entries.

methods.name: toHtml
methods.description: Generates and returns the HTML element based on the current configuration.

methods.name: _typeCheckConfig
methods.description: Performs type checking on the configuration object.

methods.name: _checkContent
methods.description: Validates the content entries for correct types.

methods.name: _setContent
methods.description: Sets the content of a specific element within the template based on the selector.

methods.name: _maybeSanitize
methods.description: Sanitizes the input HTML if sanitization is enabled.

methods.name: _resolvePossibleFunction
methods.description: Executes the argument if it is a function, otherwise returns it.

methods.name: _putElementInTemplate
methods.description: Inserts an element into the template at the specified location.
